source.title: Basolateral Amygdala to Orbitofrontal Cortex Projections Enable Cue-Triggered Reward Expectations

confidence_rationale: Provides direct circuit-level evidence for the BLA-to-OFC projection as the substrate for cue-triggered outcome expectations — the architectural basis for SD-016's z_world-only query path. Chemogenetic inactivation of BLA terminals in OFC (but not OFC terminals in BLA) blocked the motivating influence of cue-triggered reward representations on behaviour. Critically, this disruption was specific to CUE-triggered expectations, not to non-cue-triggered instrumental action-reward associations. This selectivity mirrors SD-016's design: the cue-indexed E1 query path is distinct from non-cue-driven outcome learning. Confidence moderate because the paper studies reward (not harm) and rat, not human.
failure_signatures: If OFC-to-BLA projections (reverse direction) were equally necessary, the unidirectional BLA-to-OFC feed that SD-016's z_world query path implements would lack biological support.
If the cue-selectivity of the BLA-OFC effect could be explained by OFC lesion confounds rather than the directional projection, the circuit specificity would be undermined.

mapping.source_claim_statement: BLA-to-OFC projections (not OFC-to-BLA) are required for cue-triggered reward expectations to motivate action selection; not required when actions are guided by action-reward contingencies or by direct reward delivery.
mapping.ree_translation: SD-016's z_world-only ContextMemory query path implements this BLA-to-frontal channel: BLA analog (SD-035 amygdala substrate) provides the valenced cue-context via z_harm_a; E1 retrieves the associated cue-affordance representation (z_world-indexed); OFC analog output feeds into E2 action affordance bias (MECH-151). The cue-specificity finding directly validates the architectural decision to use a z_world-only query rather than a blended [z_self, z_world] query.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Paper uses appetitive reward in rats; SD-016 is implemented for harm-avoidance (aversive). The BLA-OFC circuit topology should be preserved for harm but the parameter regime and valence may differ. The REE z_world query maps to OFC receiving BLA-context, not directly measuring the BLA->OFC monosynaptic projection.
mapping.source_context: Male Long-Evans rats; Pavlovian-to-instrumental transfer + devaluation paradigms; DREADD chemogenetic inactivation of directional projections

confidence_components.notes: Strong method (chemogenetic directional inactivation in J Neurosci). Moderate mapping fidelity because appetitive reward =/= harm avoidance; but circuit architecture claim is valence-agnostic and well-validated across appetitive and aversive domains in other studies.
